nonBlockingIssues.description: PortalRoleActionMatrix Predicates table lists 10 of 11 actual constants. Missing ADMIN_SALES_FACTORY_ACCOUNTING (hasAnyAuthority('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_SALES','ROLE_FACTORY','ROLE_ACCOUNTING')), used by SalesController for dealer management endpoints.

ROLE_ADMIN description says 'Platform administrator (tenant-scoped)' but the SystemRole enum says 'Platform administrator'. The parenthetical is editorially accurate but doesn't match the source verbatim.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a concise PortalRoleActionMatrix predicate reference to .factory/library/ so future workers adding portal-facing endpoints can quickly discover the 11 canonical access-control predicates without reading the Java source file.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The docs-platform-admin-portal-rbac worker had to read PortalRoleActionMatrix.java to enumerate all constants. A centralized reference would reduce redundant source exploration.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed the docs-worker skill procedure with no deviations.
rejectedObservations.reason: Normative statement about procedure compliance; not actionable knowledge for the library.
